name: agentprivacy-disclosure-phi
description: The Phi-Adjacency Conjecture — Zero Tale 31's arithmetic discovery that true blade namings sit near 1/φ from below. Activates when discussing disclosure-to-constraint proportions, phi-seeking sovereignty blades, the NEAR/Zcash 61.8/38.2 split, or the extension of Φ(Σ) from a binary separation measure to a proportion.
